title: Battle of Rivals/Season 1
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:Battle of Rivals: Season 1}} {{Infobox league |game=bgmi |liquipediatier=4 |name=Battle of Rivals: Season 1 |icon= |tickername=Battle of Rivals S1 |shortname=BOR:S1 |image=Battle of the Rivals.png |type=Online |team_number=17 |series=Battle of Rivals |organizer= Villager Esports |organizer-link=https://www.instagram.com/villageresports/ |sponsor=[https://www.instagram.com/rivalryesportsbgmi/ Rivalry Esports] |mode=squads |prizepoolusd= |perspective=tpp |localcurrency=inr |prizepool=2,50,000 |country=India |sdate=2021-11-25 |edate=2021-11-28 |twitter=RivalryBGMI |instagram=rivalryesportsbgmi |web= |discord=Zx38Y25Pse |loco=streamers/villager_esports |facebook= |youtube=channel/UCCPEzEvTRd4e7NdeXG-NslA }} '''''[https://www.instagram.com/rivalryesportsbgmi/ Rivalry Esports]''''' in association with '''''[https://www.instagram.com/villageresports/ Villager Esports]''''' present the first season of the BGMI tournament ''Battle of Rivals'' called the '''''Battle of Rivals Season 1''''' with a prize pool of ₹2,50,000 INR ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{box|start|padding=1em}} {{broadcasterCard |position= Hindi Commentator |lang=in |b1=Mayavi |b2=SardarjiYT }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== '''''Battle of Rivals: Season 1:''' 17th November 2021 to 29th November 2021.'' ''Maps: {{Abbr/TPP}} [[Erangel]] and [[Miramar]]'' '''''Qualifiers Round 1:''' 17th November to 20th November 2021.'' * ''A total of 1,000 teams will play in Qualifiers Round 1.'' * ''Teams to be divided into 50 groups.'' * ''Each team will get to play a single match.'' * ''Top 4 Teams from each group will qualify for the Qualifiers Round 2.'' * ''Top 200 teams advance to Qualifiers Round 2.''
'''''Qualifiers Round 2:''' 21st November to 22nd November 2021.'' * ''A total of 200 teams will play in Qualifiers Round 2'' * ''Teams to be divided into 10 groups.'' * ''Each team will get to play a total of 2 matches'' * ''Top 2 Teams from each group will qualify for Round 3.'' * ''Top 20 teams advance to Qualifiers Round 3.''
'''''Qualifiers Round 3:''' 23rd November 2021.'' * ''A total of 20 teams will play in Qualifiers Round 3'' * ''Teams will play a total of 5 matches'' * ''Top 5 teams advance to the Invitational Phase.''
'''''Invitational Phase:''' 25th November 2021 to 28th November 2021.'' * ''A total of 17 teams (12 Invited + 5 Qualified) will play in the Invitational Phase'' * ''3 Matches to be played each day.'' * ''Teams will play a total of 12 matches over a period of 4 days to decided the winner'' ====Matchdays==== * ''4 Matchdays: 3 Matches to be played each day.'' ** '''''Map Rotation''''': ''(E>>M>>E)'' ====Points Distribution==== {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" ! colspan="2"|Points Distribution |- |'''''Finish Points''''' ||''1 per finish'' |- !width=101px|Place !width=101px|Points |- |{{Placement|1}}||15 |- |{{Placement|2}}||12 |- |{{Placement|3}}||10 |- |{{Placement|4}}||8 |- |{{Placement|5}}||6 |- |{{Placement|6}}||4 |- |{{Placement|7}}||2 |- |{{Placement|8-12}}||1 |- |{{Placement|13-17}}||0 |} ===Prize Pool=== ₹2,50,000 {{Abbr/INR}} ( $3,365 {{Abbr/USD}} ) are spread among the teams and the players as seen below:
